---
title: "Post With Code"
author: "Joseph Paul"
date: "2022-09-15"
categories: [news, code, analysis]
image: "image.jpg"
---

This is a post with executable code.

## Parametric Plots

Plot function pair (x(u), y(u)). 
See @fig-parametric for an example.

```{julia}
#| label: fig-parametric
#| fig-cap: "Parametric Plots"

using Plots

plot(sin, 
     x->sin(2x), 
     0, 
     2π, 
     leg=false, 
     fill=(0,:lavender))
```
